creator: peterb@muc.de
text:
About two minutes after booting, the systems freezes. When
		pressing ALT-F?, an endless beep is heard.
		It happens with both the 1542 installed and not installed,
		any SCSI cable, with or without terminator power on a
		device installed.

Fix: 

??
How-To-Repeat: Just boot ...
		I tried -current once, same thing.
